query_normalized: predicting battery electrolyte decomposition products via dft and machine learning chemistry
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly measures the specific biological/chemical mechanism (electrolyte decomposition products) and the dependent variable (SEI formation products) on the exact domain (lithium-ion battery electrolytes) requested by the user, even though it uses ab initio molecular dynamics rather than the specific DFT/ML combination mentioned in the query.
